expectations.evidence: File is markdown with headings (##, ###), tables, and ASCII diagrams — no structured entity/value/command/event blocks
Entities described: LoanApplication (Aggregate Root), CreditAnalysis, ProductConfiguration, AutoApprovalConfiguration (4 entities in markdown tables)
LoanApplication is labeled 'Aggregate Root' at line 127; the word 'aggregate' appears in the ubiquitous language table and entity descriptions
State Machine section at line 372 with ASCII diagram and transitions table for LoanApplication lifecycle (DRAFT -> SUBMITTED -> UNDER_REVIEW -> APPROVED/REJECTED)

Invariants Summary table at line 412 lists 5 invariants: applicationMustBeComplete, noAutoRejection, overrideMustHaveJustification, scoringOverrideMustHaveRationale, routingOverrideRequiresHigherAuthority
ApplicationSubmissionRejected event at line 358 (failure path on SubmitLoanApplication); guards and preconditions documented on commands
